select-credential.label: Select credential type
select-credential.description: Please select the credential type you wish to receive from an issuer.
select-credential.no-types-available: None of your connected issuers offer requestable credentials. Connect to an issuer that issues Member or Data Supplier credentials.

select-issuer.label: Select issuer
select-issuer.description: Please select the issuer you request the credential from.

no-connected-issuers.title: You are not connected to any issuer!
no-connected-issuers.description: Please go to the Issuer page and connect with an issuer.

verify-keypair.label: Verify keypair
verify-keypair.description: Prove ownership of a cryptographic keypair before sending the request.
verify-keypair.intro: This credential type is bound to a keypair you control. A fresh proof is required for every request - any previous proof is single-use.

completed.title: Keypair verified for this credential request
completed.description: Your signature checked out. The verified did:key will be bound to your request - click Continue below to review and submit.

confirm-data.label: Confirm data
confirm-data.description: Please confirm your request. With clicking "confirm" the issuer is informed about your request.

card.confirm: With clicking "confirm" the issuer is informed about your request.
card.request-failed: Failed to send credential request. Please try again.
card.request-conflict: You already have a pending credential request for this issuer. Please wait for it to be approved or rejected before submitting a new one.

success-card.title: Your request has been sent
success-card.description: Your request will be sent to the issuer. Once the credential has been issued to you we will inform you by e-mail about the result of the verification.
